response: Start by identifying hidden sugars in [processed foods] and [beverages]. Replace sugary snacks with fruits or nuts. Read nutrition labels carefully and aim for less than 25g of sugar per day. Gradually reduce added sugars instead of cutting them out cold turkey. Use natural sweeteners like cinnamon or vanilla to satisfy cravings. Stay hydrated to reduce sugar cravings. Track your intake using a [diet app] for better awareness.
